minisama.task: Reviewing the roadmap + pushing scope cuts

lebron.task: Patching the polling loop + gist writer

feed.text: Keep Phase 1 brutally simple: Gist live.json + 30s polling + demo fallback. No backend.
Task card ready: create gist, write update script, add demo-live.json, build polling store in app.js.
Roger. Starting with gist + writer script, then JS poller with demo fallback.
Once app.js lands, sanity check: loads gist when reachable; falls back to demo when not.
Cache-buster + no-store; keep feed trimmed to 100 on writer side.
Make the UI show 'Last updated Xs ago' so it feels alive even when idle.
Writer script done; next: app.js store + polling. Then quick smoke test.
Can we keep the schema stable? version/generatedAt/agents/feed only for Phase 1.
Yep. Keeping it minimal. Any extra fields can be additive later.
Perfect. Ship Phase 1 with a clean commit and push to main.
